| deity = {{ill|Hachiman|lt=Hachiman|ar|هاتشيمان|az|Haçiman|ca|Hachiman|de|Hachiman|el|Χατσίμαν|en|Hachiman|es|Hachiman|eu|Hachiman|fa|هاچیمان|fi|Hachiman|fr|Hachiman|hu|Hacsiman|id|Hachiman|it|Hachiman|ja|八幡神|ko|하치만 신|mni|ꯍꯆꯤꯃꯥꯟ|my|ဟချိမန်း|pl|Hachiman|pt|Hachiman|ru|Хатиман|simple|Hachiman|sl|Hačiman|sv|Hachiman|tr|Hachiman|uk|Хачіман|uz|Hachiman|vi|Hachiman|wuu|八幡神|zh|八幡神|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hachiman Shrine'''|八幡神社 (下田市吉佐美)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}

* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}

[[JA:八幡神社 (下田市吉佐美)]]

{{wikidata link|Q134927474}}

== Japanese content ==
{{Shrine
|Name = Hachiman Shrine
|Image = {{Image needed|cat=Shimoda City}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|39|32.5|N|138|54|54.8|E}}}}
|Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|qid=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}} Kisami 1722-1
|Coordinates = {{coord|34|39|32.5|N|138|54|54.8|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|Enshrined deity = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
|Shrine rank = Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
|Founded = 
|Main hall = 
|Other names = 
|Pilgrimage sites, etc. = 
|Annual festival = October 15
|Rituals = 
|Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Hachiman Shrine|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|39|32.5|N|138|54|54.8|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Hachiman Shrine''' (はちまんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kisami, {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|qid=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401050 Hachiman Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>. It is also called '''Kisami Hachiman Shrine''' (きさみはちまんじんじゃ), taking its name from the locality.

=== Overview ===
The shrine is enshrined on the west side of the road that heads south from {{ill|lt=National Route 136|Q11421406|qid=Q11421406|1=Japan National Route 136}} toward Kisami Ohama Beach.

It is a candidate shrine (ronsha) for '''Kamiminomikoto Shrine''' (かみのみことじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}. The Mishima Shrine enshrined together as an auxiliary shrine was merged in {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 11 ({{ill|lt=1879|Q7783|qid=Q7783|1=1879}}) and is considered to correspond to one of the three seats of '''Takama (Tsukumano) Shrine''' (たかま(つくまの)じんじゃ), a Shikinaisha, whose enshrined deity is Awa-me no Mikoto, the principal consort of Mishima Daimyōjin. Furthermore, the Wakamiya subsidiary shrine within the precincts is a candidate shrine for '''Takemikakanomikoto Shrine''' (たけみかかのみことじんじゃ), also a Shikinaisha<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/hatiman_title.htm Hachiman Shrine] - Genmatsuko</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140142-02.html Hachiman Shrine] - Research on Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Shrine grounds ===
* {{ill|lt=Isunoki of Hachiman Shrine|Q124719160|qid=Q124719160|1=Hachimanjinja no Isunoki}} - A nationally designated natural monument.

{{Reflist}}
